programmes.show_description: Drunk with Power: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter swaps lives with US Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh when they meet on a brewery tour and become best friends over a beer.
The Birthday Bootlegger: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter's new boss bans his favourite part of work - office birthdays - and Stewie gets detention and turns rough.
Must Love Dogs: Anarchic animated sitcom. Quagmire pretends that Brian is his dog when he meets an avid dog lover, and Chris helps Stewie retrieve some stolen Halloween candy.
What Great Advancements!: US animated comedy series. In an episode paying homage to Charlie Chaplin, Stan is a modest inventor who leaves his farm to try his luck in the big city.
Epic Powder Dump: US animated comedy series. Stan takes his family out to replicate the ski trips from his childhood, and Klaus harbours a crush on a tech support operator.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. When a package of theirs is stolen, the Titans must join a crew of porch pirates to get it back.
Boarding Games / Paintings / Winter Hungerland: Animated series. A kitten goes to doggy daycare, Porky Pig's pet paints a picture, and Wolf gets hungry in a winter wonderland.
Where Stalks the Scarebear: Animated adventures with Scooby and the gang. The mayor enlists the Mystery Inc. gang to investigate the sightings of a mutant bear.
Game of Chicken: Animated adventure series. Fred gets a call for help from his best friend to lead the gang on a rescue mission deep in the caverns of an ancient civilisation.
All Paws on Deck: Animated adventure series. The gang climb aboard a cruise ship run by Fred's cousin, but a water phobia is the least of their problems when a sea monster attacks!
Matt Edmondson narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe.
Stylish Sanctuary Whistler: House-hunting show. Stephen and Ivan are moving to their dream location of Whistler and need a home that has views and is modern but with a rustic feel.
In London, Jessica, Shai and Harley all hope to impress model and personal trainer Robbie with their style choices.
There are much bigger things going on beneath the recent chaos in Essex as Courtney goes to see her sister while Saff goes to see Lauren and they bond over their shared grief.
Courtney brings Chloe and Saff together for a day out where the girls open up about how they feel, and Ella's invitation of Harry to a birthday party backfires due to a bombshell.
Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as another of his brave contestants steps up to take on the infamous Banker for a chance at a life-changing cash prize.
Samia Longchambon, Amy Dowden, and Will Best join Stephen Mulhern as they try to 'say what they see' and guess well-known phrases for their chance to win 50,000 pounds for charity.
Reality game show where celebrities cause chaos to win money for unsuspecting contestants of totally fake TV shows! Olivia Attwood joins as this week's rebellious Guest Saboteur.
Part-animated family adventure comedy film featuring the voice of Michael J Fox and starring Hugh Laurie, 1999. A family adopt a charming young mouse, but their cat hates the idea.

Part-animated family adventure comedy film featuring the voice of Michael J Fox and starring Hugh Laurie, 1999. A family adopt a charming young mouse, but their cat hates the idea.
The auditions return to Blackpool's Winter Gardens as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges, Simon, Amanda, Alesha and KSI.
Teenager Jessie-Lou delivers a 'glorious' Les Miserables performance, and Stephen Greenwood pauses his honeymoon to audition and show off his impressive octave range.
Anarchic musical comedy film starring Jack Black and Joan Cusack, 2003. A slobbish guitarist poses as a supply teacher but ends up moulding his pupils to become rock music gods.

Lois C.K.: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter tries his best to straighten his life out when Lois becomes a stand-up comedian using real-life stories about him as her lead material.
The Fatman Always Rings Twice: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in Rhode Island. Peter does a noir-style investigation of Meg's disappearance.
80's Guy: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter's nostalgia for the '80s compels him to recreate iconic film scenes from that decade, and Stewie competes with Doug to retrieve a frisbee.
American Dad Graffito: US animated comedy series. Stan discovers that his favourite diner is closing down, and matters get worse when Hayley's workplace plots to build on its site.
Dressed Down: US animated comedy series. One of Roger's personas helps a buttoned-up Stan with spicing up his wardrobe, and Hayley and Jeff attempt to raise their own chickens.
The Race: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Marcus and Stylax try to raise 3,000 denarii to avoid the girls being deported, and Grumio visits Landlord in prison through a sewage pipe.
Hi-tech impressions show. Floyd Mayweather and Dua Lipa feud with Matthew McConaughey over a big tree, and newlyweds Nicki Minaj and Tom Holland argue with Mark Zuckerberg.

Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. The Titans time travel back to the 1990s so they can visit a video store, but they encounter a familiar foe in doing so.
Birthday Grifts / Vintage Porkys / Tub-o-War: Animated series. Elmer Fudd throws a birthday party, Porky Pig goes old school, and Marvin the Martian tries to give his dog a bath.
Wrath of the Krampus: Animated adventures with Scooby and the gang. A teenager vandalising a neighbourhood is attacked by a creature that leaves his hair white with fear.
Poodle Justice: Animated adventure series. When the gang visits the set of Scooby's favourite TV show, he must work up the courage to talk to its star and stop a monstrous gargoyle!
Grand Scam: Animated adventure series. Shaggy takes the gang to the Minor League Baseball stadium of his youth, but he learns that it's about to be shut down because of a ghost!
Lover's Haven Miami: House-hunting show. Lovebirds Asi and Kayla are looking for their first home - with a budget of over one million dollars, they have to be on Miami's beachfront.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Billie and dad Chatty spend quality time together as he seems to have beaten the booze, and Greg treats Nelly as her 10th birthday approaches.
Courtney brings Chloe and Saff together for a day out where the girls open up about how they feel, and Ella's invitation of Harry to a birthday party backfires due to a bombshell.
What Would Michelle O Do?: US reality series. Kenya visits an estate lawyer to discuss the worst-case scenario as her marriage woes continue.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Sutton on Trial at Sea: US reality series. Sutton apologises to Dorit for her poor use of words at Jennifer's party, but Dorit thinks the apology is a day late.
Rylan Clark-Neal is joined by 2019 Love Islanders Anton and Belle, Ovie and India, and Chris and Harley as he hosts a very special edition of the game show.
It's a couples' edition as Graham Norton welcomes three pairs - Corinne and Aaron, Quamelle and Adam, and Len and Nancy - all hoping to keep the spark alive and win 50,000 pounds.
The drama continues in Essex with Ella questioning Jodie's loyalty, Elma organising a surprise 30th birthday bash redo for Courtney, and Amy's brother Wills arriving on the scene.
The Green-Eyed Monster: Reality series. Paige delivers some controversial invitations with a bang, Ell sets the record straight with Rachel, and Ampika surprises Seema.
Head Over 'Hills': US reality series. NeNe extends an olive branch to Cynthia and Cynthia's boyfriend Mike decides that he's ready to take things to the next level.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: A Caribbean Send Off: US reality series. A catamaran ride ends in rough waters before the final dinner in Saint Lucia leads to some very ruffled feathers.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the game show with Alex Jones, Tyler West, and Ricky Wilson all trying to 'say what they see' for a chance to win big for charity.
Graham Norton welcomes essential skills teacher Orla, development manager Kelly, and events duty officer Ben as they take on the fabled Wheel in the hope of winning 50,000 pounds.
Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.
...Mother and Daughter Killers. Documentary. An examination of two deaths in 2022 that led to the first instance of a mother and daughter being convicted of double murder in the UK.
Mister Act: Anarchic animated sitcom. When Peter has an accident that leaves him with a high-pitched voice, Jesus helps him fend off the other choirboys.
Brief Encounter: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter and Quagmire mimic each other's behaviour when they switch underwear, and Stewie and Doug agree to commit each other's murders.
